name: @hyperprior/pi-bundle
description: Meta package installing all Hyperprior pi plugins
readme:
# @hyperprior/pi-bundle

Installs all Hyperprior plugin packages as one dependency.

## Installation\n
```bash
pi install npm:@hyperprior/pi-bundle
```

## Notes

All plugins in this monorepo are namespaced under `@hyperprior` and built to be loaded as individual pi packages.
